spec_match.rationale: Shows the contrast between partitioned (URL + origin keyed) and single-keyed pervasive resource cache keys correctly.

interactive.rationale: Fully interactive browse simulator visiting multiple sites with real stats counters and a clear clear-cache operation.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligns nicely with ChromeStatus and specification motivations around CDN optimization.

edge_cases.rationale: Allows clearing cache and toggling policy in-flight, updating logs and counters immediately.

references.rationale: Includes proper external references and crumbs link.

design_system.rationale: Appealing custom tabular row feedback with strong/weak borders adhering to showcase styles.

summary: Brilliant cross-origin bandwidth simulation demonstrating how partitioned HTTP cache hurts loading performance and how the pervasive list fixes it.
